title: Right At Home-Midland's Most Marvelous with Pool
tagline: Holiday home in Midland with kitchen and fireplace

houseRules.events: Events allowed: family gatherings, birthday parties, weddings (Maximum attendees: 16)
houseRules.pets: Dogs allowed: less than 23 kg per pet (limit 2 pets total)
additionalRules: For Extend Stays over 10 days The customer will be assessed an additional cleaning fee every 10 days for cleaning.
An additional $100 per night for the duration of the stay will be added to the reservation if you would like the pool heated (takes 18 hours).

importantInfo: This property is managed by a professional host
Extra-person charges may apply and vary depending on property policy
Government-issued photo identification and a credit card, debit card or cash deposit may be required at check-in for incidental charges
Special requests are subject to availability upon check-in and may incur additional charges; special requests cannot be guaranteed
Parties and events (including family gatherings, birthday parties and weddings) are allowed on site. Maximum attendees: 16
Host has indicated that there is a carbon monoxide detector on the property
Host has indicated that there is a smoke detector on the property

list.title: Comfortable stay
list.author: Ashley P.
list.content: Comfortable beds. Nice pool. Good neighborhood.

list.title: Grandaughter soccer tournament trip
list.author: lalo v.
list.content: House was clean and in a great area. It was close to many restaurants and grocery stores. Pool was nice and clean. Host was easily accessible and responded quickly to any questions we had about the home.

list.title: Great Stay!
list.author: Leslie B.
list.content: Midland's Most Marvelous with a Pool provided my family with a great stay. The house is spacious, in a nice neighborhood, and close to shopping and activities! Also, the pool was a perfect way to unwind at the end of the day. The beds were comfortable, and the house was quiet at night which induced easy sleeping. I highly recommend this house for a stay in Midland.

description:
Your Midland getaway awaits at this 4-bedroom house. Each room features a cozy queen bed with 58" smart Tv, perfect for a serene night's sleep. With amazing Backyard with pool, guests can relax and unwind enjoying a game on the backporch or grilling under the west Texas sky. The home features indoor dining for 10 and outdoor dining for 6. The kitchen is fully equipped to prepare your meals, with plenty of room for multiple cooks. Stretch out on the large sectional sofa and watch your favorite movie on the 65" living room television. Enjoy your time in Midland at our memorable house.

Our prices include all fees. No hidden fees.
